race.comment: AMENOPHIS (4) was safely held when seventh last time out over 1200m at Gold Coast, beaten 5 lengths. That followed a win at this track at the previous outing. Has started two times at this course and distance and is yet to miss the placings. Has the talent to produce another win. WARILLA GORILLA (7) lost narrowly when second over 1300m at this circuit last time but starting to prove costly. Rates well on recent efforts and is an each-way hope again. DATA LEAK (9) is yet to find the frame in two runs since resuming from a spell, the latest when fifth over 1100m at Ipswich. Cherry-ripe now and is worth following up. REJOICED (1) can do better returning to this course.
